Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentType

Packages that use ContentType
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http.classic
Predefined HTTP headers, parts, entities, resources, and responses built on the classic Apache HttpComponents API.
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.entity
HTTP Entity Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header
HTTP Header Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.resource
HTTP Resource Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.

  • Uses of ContentType in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic that return types with arguments of type ContentType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<ContentType>
    RestResponse.getContentType()
    Shortcut for retrieving the response content type from the Content-Type header.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic with parameters of type ContentType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestRequest
    RestClient.patch(Object uri, String body, ContentType contentType)
    Perform a PATCH request against the specified URI as a plain text body bypassing the serializer.
    RestRequest
    RestClient.post(Object uri, String body, ContentType contentType)
    Perform a POST request against the specified URI as a plain text body bypassing the serializer.
    RestRequest
    RestClient.put(Object uri, String body, ContentType contentType)
    Perform a PUT request against the specified URI using a plain text body bypassing the serializer.
